verses.text: Lungdamna zongin nuam ka sak bang bangin om ning, ci-in ka ngaihsun leuleu hi. Tua zong a mawknapi ahihna ka phawk zel hi
Nuihna pen haina ahihna, nopna pen bangmahin a kiman'lohna ka mukhia hi
Mihingte in leitungah tomno a nuntak sungin bangci om leh hoih ding ahi hiam, cih ka muh theihna dingin pilna ka deihna mah tawh, zunekna tawh ka lung nuamsakin, ka utut sep ding ka hanciam hi
Na lian tampi tak mah ka sem zo hi. Keima-a' dingin inn tampi tak ka lam a, leenggui lo tampi tak mah ka nei hi
Huan bawlin singno cin'na lo zong ka nei a, ka huan sungah nektheih namkim kidim hi
Tua singnote tui piakna dingin tuikhukpi zong ka bawl hi
Ka inn-ah a suak silate banah, sila a nu a pa-in tampi tak ka neithuah hi. Tuuhonte leh bawnghonte zong tampi tak ka nei a, Jerusalem-a om ngei dangte khempeuh sangin ka hauzaw hi
Ka zawhsa kumpite' sumkholna panin keima-a' dingin ngun leh kham zong ka la hi. Ka lungnopna dingin la a sa ding lasiam numei leh pasal tampi ka nei a, ka deih zahzah zong ka neizo hi
Tua ahih ciangin keima hun ma-in Jerusalem-ah a om ngei mite khempeuh sangin ka lianzaw a, ka pilna zong bei tuanlo hi
Ka deih khempeuh ka nei a, ka ut bangbangin omin ka gamta hi. Ka sepna khempeuhah nuam ka sa hi; tua nopsakna pen ka nasepna hangin ka phattuamna ahi hi
Tua ciangin ka sepsa na khempeuh, tua bangin haksapi-a ka sepnate ka ngaihsut kik ciangin, na khempeuh a mawknapi ahihna, leh leitungah bangmah phattuamna a omlohna ka phawk hi
A hi-in ci lehang, kumpi khat in ama ma-a kumpipa' hihsa teng mah a hih thei bek ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin pilna, haina, mawkna i cih bang ahi hiam, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi
Tua banga ka ngaihsut ciangin, khuavak in khuamial a zawh bangin, pilna pen haina zawhna ahihlam ka mu hi
Mipilte in a paina ding mun mu thei a, mihaite in a paina ding mun mu theilo hi. Ahi zongin a pil leh a hai in a kibang khat a tuah tuak ding ka thei hi

Tua ciangin, “Mihaite tungah a piang ding thute kei' tungah zong hong piang ding ahih manin, ka pil mahmah manin bang phattuamna ngah ka hi hiam?” ka ci a, “Bangmah ngah kei ing, themkhat zong ngah kei ing,” ci-in ka kidawng hi
Mihaite a kiphawkphawk loh mah bangin, mipilte zong kiphawkphawk tuanlo a, mailam hunah i vekpi-in hong kimangngilh lel ding ahi hi. A pil a hai-in, i vekpi-in i si ding hi

Tua ahih ciangin hih leitunga sepna khempeuh in lungkhamna cihloh hong piaktheih dang bangmah omlo ahih manin, hih leitunga hin'na pen kei-a' dingin a kiman'na bangmah omlo hi. A mawknapi, huih hawmguak bang bek hi lel hi
Keimah a hong laih dingpa tungah ka neih ka lam khempeuh ka nusiat ding thei ka hih manin, nakpi takin sem-a ka gimpih nate pen kei-a' dingin a phattuamna omlo hi
Kei hong laihpa pil ta leh hai ta leh, ka pilna ka siamna khempeuh zang-a ka sepsa nate luahin a ukpa hi ding hi. Hih pen a mawknapi taktak ahi hi
Tua ahih ciangin hih leitungah nakpi takin na ka sepna ka kisik hi
Pilna, siamna, theihna sitloin na kisem a, themkhat zong a gimpih hetlo mi khat-a' dingin nusiat ding hi zenzen hi. Hih thu a man hetlo, a mawknapi taktak ahi hi
Mi khat in hih leitungah lunghimawhin thatang sanin na a sepna-ah bang phattuamna ngah ahi hiam
Sepna bawlna khempeuhah lungkhamna leh sinkhamna bekbek hi a, zan nangawnin a ihmut mawhpih hi. Hih pen a mawknapi taktak ahi hi
Mihing khat in a nasepna thamanin an ne tui dawnin nuamsa-in a om sangin a hoihzaw bangmah dang omlo hi. Ahi zongin tua nangawn zong, Pasian' hang ahihna ka phawk hi
Pasian kihel loin kua in an ne-in nuamsa thei ding ahi hiam

Pasian in amah a lungdamsakte tungah pilna, theihna, leh lungdamna pia a, ahi zongin a hehpihhuai mimawhte ahih leh a sep bek sisakin, amau' thalawhsa khempeuh amah a lungdamsakte tungah a piaksak hi. Hih pen a mawknapi taktak, huihpi nungdelh bang bek ahi hi.
